x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Territory definitions enable Now Assist FSM to scope AI scheduling to geographic coverage areas.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure field service territories via wm_territory_list.do. Assign agents to territories. Now Assist FSM uses territory boundaries for AI-optimized geographic dispatch.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb5
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Territory definitions enable Now Assist FSM to scope AI scheduling to geographic coverage areas.]]></ai_justification><check_name>FSM Territory Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("wm_territory");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table wm_territory not found", finding: "FSM Territory table (wm_territory) is not available. Verify the Field Service Management plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("wm_territory");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active field service territories";
    if (count >= 5) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active territories. Now Assist FSM can optimize scheduling within defined geographic coverage areas." };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active territory(ies) (target: 5+). Now Assist FSM geographic scheduling optimization will have limited coverage differentiation." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No active territories configured. Now Assist FSM cannot account for geographic zones in AI scheduling." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>FIELD_SERVICE</module><number>CHK0000431</number><order>40</order><remediation_guidance>Configure field service territories via wm_territory_list.do. Assign agents to territories. Now Assist FSM uses territory boundaries for AI-optimized geographic dispatch.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>FSM Territory Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
